$comment: D-LK4-RODATA-PRODUCER-LOCAL-ARRAY-DECAY + D-LK4-RODATA-PRODUCER-NONSTRING-GLOBAL-ARRAY-DECAY (FC8): non-string array->pointer decay (C 6.3.2.1) for a LOCAL array (alloca base) and a GLOBAL array (GlobalAddr, bytes in rodata), incl. WRITE-THROUGH proving the decayed pointer aliases the real storage. a={3,4,1}; bump(a)->a[0]=4; sum3(a)=9; sum3(g)=31; 9+31+2=42. Runtime operands (non-inlined calls) so the decay is never folded away. A wrong address / a copy / a fail-loud flips the exit. arm64 under qemu; macho on the macos-latest leg.
